overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the hooded protagonist exploring a sunlit medieval Middle Eastern city. The character walks through a central plaza with stone fountains, ascends into a lush garden area, and descends into narrow market streets with adobe architecture and bustling NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with large stone fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain, observing the plaza and passing by NPCs sitting near the water

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing through the plaza from left to right

entered.detail: large multi-tiered stone fountain with water flowing, decorated with blue tile patterns
ornate cobblestone ground with geometric patterns in gray and beige stones
tan-colored historic buildings with Islamic architectural details and wooden balconies
wooden market stall covered with green fabric canopy displaying goods
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit central plaza with a large ornate fountain as the focal point. The protagonist walks around the fountain on patterned cobblestones, passing NPCs sitting by the water's edge. A horse and rider cross the plaza from left to right as the camera circles the fountain area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway leading to upper garden

events.description: leaving the open plaza and approaching the garden entrance with stone stairs
beginning to ascend the stone stairs into the elevated garden area

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the stone stairs leading up to the garden level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward to the garden
stone archway marking the entrance to the upper garden area
wooden signboard with paper posters attached near the stair entrance
large terracotta pots with green shrubs flanking the stairway

segments.scene_description: The protagonist leaves the fountain plaza behind and approaches a stone stairway leading upward. Passing wooden signboards and potted plants, the character begins ascending the stairs toward a garden entrance archway, transitioning from the open plaza to a more enclosed garden space.

scene_state.functional_zone: lush garden with stone pathways and flowering gazebo

events.description: entering the shaded garden area with dense vegetation and tree cover
turning around at the garden path intersection to head back toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden paths, passing under a vine-covered gazebo and turning around near a secondary fountain

entered.detail: irregular stone pathway winding through the garden with grass growing between stones
octagonal wooden gazebo covered in flowering vines and pink blossoms
smaller tiered fountain with water flowing into a circular basin
dense green shrubs, flowering plants, and small trees lining the path
white and purple flowers planted along the garden path edges

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the protagonist explores a tranquil garden with dappled sunlight filtering through trees. The character walks along stone paths past a vine-covered gazebo and flower beds, reaching a small secondary fountain before turning around to head back. The dense vegetation creates a sheltered, peaceful atmosphere distinct from the open plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from garden back to central plaza

events.description: descending the stone stairs and exiting the garden back to the open plaza level
re-entering the main fountain plaza area and turning toward the narrow streets

agents.ego_description: walking down the garden stairs and re-entering the bustling plaza, navigating through crowds toward the street entrance

notable_agents.action: guard in white robes walking ahead of the protagonist toward the street

entered.detail: the large central fountain visible again as the protagonist descends back to plaza level
returning to the patterned cobblestone surface of the main plaza
wooden stall with goods displayed under a green canopy
opening between buildings leading into the narrow market streets

segments.scene_description: The protagonist descends the garden stairs back to the plaza level, rejoining the busier crowd near the central fountain. Passing market stalls and navigating through pedestrians, the character approaches an entrance to a narrow street, transitioning from the open plaza to the enclosed urban alleyways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with adobe buildings

events.description: entering the narrow street with tall adobe buildings casting shadows
passing close to guards standing near a building entrance on the right

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow cobblestone street, passing merchants and guards, heading deeper into the market district

notable_agents.action: group of three guards in red robes standing guard near a building entrance
merchant in dark robes walking ahead of the protagonist

entered.detail: narrow winding street with uneven cobblestones and drainage channels
tall three-story adobe buildings with wooden balconies and shuttered windows
blue fabric awning stretched between buildings providing shade
wooden cart loaded with pottery and goods parked along the street
rough wooden scaffolding attached to a building under construction or repair

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow, winding street flanked by tall adobe buildings. The protagonist walks past market carts and under blue fabric awnings, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. Guards in red robes stand watch near a building entrance as the character continues deeper into the historic market district, passing wooden scaffolding and construction materials.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, bustling city plaza into the secluded tranquility of an elevated garden. It begins in a sunlit central square, circling an ornate fountain on patterned cobblestones as NPCs lounge by the water and a rider crosses the open space. As the protagonist leaves the plaza, the camera follows them toward a stone stairway, passing wooden signboards and potted plants while ascending toward a garden archway. The scene then shifts into a sheltered environment where dappled sunlight filters through dense trees and vines, guiding the character along stone paths past a gazebo and flower beds. Finally, the movement reaches a small secondary fountain within the lush greenery before the protagonist turns back, completing the transition from the open urban hub to a peaceful sanctuary.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the protagonist transitions from an open, airy plaza into the dense, enclosed corridors of a historic market district. It begins with the character descending garden stairs to rejoin a bustling crowd near a central stone fountain. As the protagonist navigates past market stalls and pedestrians, the wide-open space of the plaza gradually narrows, drawing the camera toward the entrance of a secluded urban alleyway. The scene then shifts into a winding street flanked by tall adobe buildings, where the sunlight is filtered through blue fabric awnings and market carts. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the district, passing red-robed guards and wooden scaffolding as the environment becomes increasingly compact and urban.
